requirement_topic.en: Radio Disturbance / EMC Emissions for Lighting (BDS/CISPR 15) vs China GB 17743
requirement_topic.zh: 照明无线电骚扰 / EMC 发射（BDS/CISPR 15）与中国 GB 17743 对比
requirement_topic.zht: 照明無線電騷擾 / EMC 發射（BDS/CISPR 15）與中國 GB 17743 對比

summary.en: Bangladesh adopts IEC/CISPR-based standards as Bangladesh Standards (BDS) through BSTI. For electromagnetic disturbance of lighting equipment, the relevant technical basis is CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), the same international base used by China's GB 17743 and the EU's EN 55015. Bangladesh does not operate a single horizontal EMC directive in the EU sense; EMC-related characteristics for lighting are addressed through the applicable BDS/IEC standards within the BSTI conformity assessment for the product. For any luminaire with wireless functionality (smart LED with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth), radio-frequency emissions and spectrum use fall under BTRC (Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission) equipment approval (see ledbd-emc-02). Exporters should confirm with BSTI which BDS/IEC EMC clauses are tested as part of the lamp/luminaire certification.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国通过 BSTI 将基于 IEC/CISPR 的标准采用为孟加拉国标准（BDS）。对于照明设备的电磁骚扰，相关技术基础为 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），与中国 GB 17743 及欧盟 EN 55015 所采用的国际基础相同。孟加拉国并未实行欧盟意义上的单一横向 EMC 指令；照明的 EMC 相关特性通过 BSTI 对该产品合格评定中适用的 BDS/IEC 标准予以处理。对于任何具备无线功能的灯具（具 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙的智能 LED），射频发射及频谱使用纳入 BTRC（孟加拉国电信监管委员会）设备核准（见 ledbd-emc-02）。出口商应向 BSTI 确认灯/灯具认证中检测了哪些 BDS/IEC EMC 条款。
summary.zht: 孟加拉通過 BSTI 將基於 IEC/CISPR 的標準採用為孟加拉標準（BDS）。對於照明設備的電磁騷擾，相關技術基礎為 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），與中國 GB 17743 及歐盟 EN 55015 所採用的國際基礎相同。孟加拉並未實行歐盟意義上的單一橫向 EMC 指令；照明的 EMC 相關特性通過 BSTI 對該產品合格評定中適用的 BDS/IEC 標準予以處理。對於任何具備無線功能的燈具（具 Wi-Fi 或藍牙的智能 LED），射頻發射及頻譜使用納入 BTRC（孟加拉電信監管委員會）設備核准（見 ledbd-emc-02）。出口商應向 BSTI 確認燈/燈具認證中檢測了哪些 BDS/IEC EMC 條款。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (adopted as Bangladesh Standard via BSTI)
BSTI conformity assessment — Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (applicable BDS/IEC clauses for the product)

summary.en: China's baseline is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires in scope of CCC in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (covering safety and EMC for relevant categories), with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. GB 17743 is the Chinese emissions baseline for lighting equipment.
summary.zh: 中国基线为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。对于在中国属于 CCC 范畴的灯具，GB 17743 合规是 CCC 认证的组成部分（对相关类别涵盖安全和 EMC），检测在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。GB 17743 是中国照明设备发射基线。
summary.zht: 中國基線為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。對於在中國屬於 CCC 範疇的燈具，GB 17743 合規是 CCC 認證的組成部分（對相關類別涵蓋安全和 EMC），檢測在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。GB 17743 是中國照明設備發射基線。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Because Bangladesh BDS, China GB 17743, and EU EN 55015 are all derived from CISPR 15, the emission limits themselves are largely harmonized. The practical gaps for a Chinese exporter are procedural and jurisdictional: (1) a Chinese GB 17743 / CCC test report is not automatically accepted for Bangladesh — BSTI conducts or accepts conformity assessment against the adopted BDS/IEC standard, and the exporter must route testing/documentation through the BSTI certification process for lamps and luminaires; (2) Bangladesh has no single horizontal EMC directive, so EMC characteristics are handled within the product certification scope rather than as a separate mandatory EMC mark; (3) confirm with BSTI whether the specific product category requires emissions testing as part of its certification, and which laboratory reports BSTI will accept. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally trigger BTRC radio approval (ledbd-emc-02).
gap.zh: 由于孟加拉国 BDS、中国 GB 17743 及欧盟 EN 55015 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值本身基本协调。对中国出口商而言，实际差距为程序性及管辖性：（1）中国 GB 17743 / CCC 检测报告在孟加拉国不被自动接受——BSTI 依据所采用的 BDS/IEC 标准进行或接受合格评定，出口商须通过 BSTI 对灯及灯具的认证流程办理检测/文件；（2）孟加拉国没有单一横向 EMC 指令，因此 EMC 特性在产品认证范围内处理，而非作为单独的强制 EMC 标志；（3）请向 BSTI 确认具体产品类别是否需在认证中进行发射检测，以及 BSTI 接受哪些实验室报告。具备无线功能的灯具还会触发 BTRC 无线电核准（ledbd-emc-02）。
gap.zht: 由於孟加拉 BDS、中國 GB 17743 及歐盟 EN 55015 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值本身基本協調。對中國出口商而言，實際差距為程序性及管轄性：（1）中國 GB 17743 / CCC 檢測報告在孟加拉不被自動接受——BSTI 依據所採用的 BDS/IEC 標準進行或接受合格評定，出口商須通過 BSTI 對燈及燈具的認證流程辦理檢測/文件；（2）孟加拉沒有單一橫向 EMC 指令，因此 EMC 特性在產品認證範圍內處理，而非作為單獨的強制 EMC 標誌；（3）請向 BSTI 確認具體產品類別是否需在認證中進行發射檢測，以及 BSTI 接受哪些實驗室報告。具備無線功能的燈具還會觸發 BTRC 無線電核准（ledbd-emc-02）。

mandatory_status.target: Handled within BSTI product certification — EMC/radio-disturbance characteristics addressed via the adopted BDS/IEC (CISPR 15) clauses where applicable to the lamp/luminaire category; no separate horizontal EMC mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for in-scope luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh handles lighting EMC/radio-disturbance through BSTI-adopted BDS/IEC (CISPR 15) standards within the product certification, not via a separate EU-style horizontal EMC directive. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but Chinese CCC/GB 17743 reports are not automatically accepted — testing and documentation must be routed through the BSTI certification process. Confirm the applicable EMC clauses and acceptable laboratory reports with BSTI, and note that wireless luminaires additionally require BTRC approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国通过 BSTI 采用的 BDS/IEC（CISPR 15）标准在产品认证中处理照明 EMC/无线电骚扰，而非通过单独的欧盟式横向 EMC 指令。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC/GB 17743 报告不被自动接受——检测及文件须通过 BSTI 认证流程办理。请向 BSTI 确认适用的 EMC 条款及可接受的实验室报告，并注意无线灯具还须取得 BTRC 核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉通過 BSTI 採用的 BDS/IEC（CISPR 15）標準在產品認證中處理照明 EMC/無線電騷擾，而非通過單獨的歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC/GB 17743 報告不被自動接受——檢測及文件須通過 BSTI 認證流程辦理。請向 BSTI 確認適用的 EMC 條款及可接受的實驗室報告，並注意無線燈具還須取得 BTRC 核准。

requirement_topic.en: BTRC Radio Equipment Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires vs China SRRC
requirement_topic.zh: 智能 / 无线灯具的 BTRC 无线电设备核准与中国 SRRC 对比
requirement_topic.zht: 智能 / 無線燈具的 BTRC 無線電設備核准與中國 SRRC 對比

summary.en: Any LED luminaire incorporating wireless functionality (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee smart lighting) used or imported into Bangladesh is radio equipment and falls under the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC). BTRC administers equipment acceptance/type approval and spectrum/standards rules under the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulation Act. Wireless luminaires generally require BTRC equipment approval before lawful import and sale, in addition to the BSTI safety certification for the luminaire itself. The radio module's operating bands must be permitted under Bangladesh's frequency allocation. Exporters should confirm the current BTRC approval procedure, required test reports (typically IEC/ETSI/FCC-equivalent RF reports), and any importer/agent requirements before shipment.
summary.zh: 任何集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 智能照明）在孟加拉国使用或进口的，均属无线电设备，纳入孟加拉国电信监管委员会（BTRC）管辖。BTRC 依据《孟加拉国电信监管法》管理设备验收/型号核准及频谱/标准规则。无线灯具通常须在合法进口及销售前取得 BTRC 设备核准，此外还须取得灯具本身的 BSTI 安全认证。无线模块的工作频段须符合孟加拉国频率分配许可。出口商应在出货前确认现行 BTRC 核准程序、所需检测报告（通常为 IEC/ETSI/FCC 等效射频报告）及任何进口商/代理要求。
summary.zht: 任何集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 智能照明）在孟加拉使用或進口的，均屬無線電設備，納入孟加拉電信監管委員會（BTRC）管轄。BTRC 依據《孟加拉電信監管法》管理設備驗收/型號核准及頻譜/標準規則。無線燈具通常須在合法進口及銷售前取得 BTRC 設備核准，此外還須取得燈具本身的 BSTI 安全認證。無線模組的工作頻段須符合孟加拉頻率分配許可。出口商應在出貨前確認現行 BTRC 核准程序、所需檢測報告（通常為 IEC/ETSI/FCC 等效射頻報告）及任何進口商/代理要求。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulation Act — BTRC equipment acceptance / type approval (Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission)
BTRC frequency allocation / spectrum rules — permitted operating bands for short-range / wireless devices

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, in addition to any CCC obligation for the luminaire. SRRC type approval governs the radio transmitter's frequency, power, and spurious emissions for the Chinese market. SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by BTRC; the two are independent radio-regulatory regimes.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具须为无线电模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，此外灯具还须满足相应 CCC 义务。SRRC 型号核准管理面向中国市场的无线电发射机频率、功率及杂散发射。SRRC 核准为中国特有，不被 BTRC 认可；两者为相互独立的无线电监管制度。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具須為無線電模組取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，此外燈具還須滿足相應 CCC 義務。SRRC 型號核准管理面向中國市場的無線電發射機頻率、功率及雜散發射。SRRC 核准為中國特有，不被 BTRC 認可；兩者為相互獨立的無線電監管制度。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation Commission (China), required for radio transmitters including wireless luminaires

gap.en: A Chinese SRRC type approval is not recognised in Bangladesh and cannot be reused — BTRC equipment approval is a separate, mandatory step for wireless luminaires before lawful import and sale. Key gaps: (1) the exporter must apply for BTRC approval (commonly via the in-country importer/agent) and meet Bangladesh's permitted frequency bands and power limits, which may differ from the Chinese allocation SRRC certifies against; (2) BTRC typically requires RF test evidence (IEC/ETSI/FCC-equivalent), so SRRC test data alone is insufficient and re-testing or report mapping may be needed; (3) BTRC approval is in addition to — not a substitute for — BSTI safety certification of the luminaire and any SREDA energy-labelling obligation. A non-wireless LED luminaire does not require BTRC approval; only the wireless/smart variant does.
gap.zh: 中国 SRRC 型号核准在孟加拉国不被认可且不可重复使用——BTRC 设备核准是无线灯具在合法进口及销售前单独的强制步骤。主要差距：（1）出口商须申请 BTRC 核准（通常通过在地进口商/代理），并满足孟加拉国许可的频段及功率限值，这些可能与 SRRC 所认证的中国分配不同；（2）BTRC 通常要求射频检测证据（IEC/ETSI/FCC 等效），因此仅有 SRRC 检测数据不足，可能需要重新检测或报告映射；（3）BTRC 核准是对灯具 BSTI 安全认证及任何 SREDA 能源标签义务的补充，而非替代。非无线 LED 灯具无需 BTRC 核准；仅无线/智能型号需要。
gap.zht: 中國 SRRC 型號核准在孟加拉不被認可且不可重複使用——BTRC 設備核准是無線燈具在合法進口及銷售前單獨的強制步驟。主要差距：（1）出口商須申請 BTRC 核准（通常通過在地進口商/代理），並滿足孟加拉許可的頻段及功率限值，這些可能與 SRRC 所認證的中國分配不同；（2）BTRC 通常要求射頻檢測證據（IEC/ETSI/FCC 等效），因此僅有 SRRC 檢測數據不足，可能需要重新檢測或報告映射；（3）BTRC 核准是對燈具 BSTI 安全認證及任何 SREDA 能源標籤義務的補充，而非替代。非無線 LED 燈具無需 BTRC 核准；僅無線/智能型號需要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless/smart luminaires — BTRC equipment approval required before lawful import and sale of any luminaire with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/Zigbee; not required for non-wireless luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — SRRC type approval required for the radio module in China; not required for non-wireless luminaires

source.publisher: Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires imported into Bangladesh require BTRC equipment approval in addition to BSTI safety certification. A Chinese SRRC type approval is not recognised by BTRC and cannot be reused — the exporter (usually via the in-country importer) must obtain BTRC approval against Bangladesh's permitted bands and power limits, typically supported by IEC/ETSI/FCC-equivalent RF test reports. Non-wireless luminaires do not require BTRC approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口到孟加拉国的智能/无线 LED 灯具除 BSTI 安全认证外，还须取得 BTRC 设备核准。中国 SRRC 型号核准不被 BTRC 认可且不可重复使用——出口商（通常通过在地进口商）须依据孟加拉国许可的频段及功率限值取得 BTRC 核准，通常须提供 IEC/ETSI/FCC 等效射频检测报告。非无线灯具无需 BTRC 核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口到孟加拉的智能/無線 LED 燈具除 BSTI 安全認證外，還須取得 BTRC 設備核准。中國 SRRC 型號核准不被 BTRC 認可且不可重複使用——出口商（通常通過在地進口商）須依據孟加拉許可的頻段及功率限值取得 BTRC 核准，通常須提供 IEC/ETSI/FCC 等效射頻檢測報告。非無線燈具無需 BTRC 核准。
